message:
Fix Feedback Wanted workflow permissions

Add pull-requests: write permission required for the reusable
workflow to post comments on merged PRs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     types: [closed]
 
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pull-requests: write
+
 jobs:
   feedback:
     uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-feedback.yml@main
